title: <li>Stale Management: Deploy the workflow that automatically closes stale issues
content:
• Stale Management: Deploy the workflow that automatically closes stale issues and PRs to keep all repositories tidy.
  • Label Syncing: Create an automation that ensures your label standards from LABELS.md are consistent across all repositories.
    • Phase 3: Consolidate Knowledge and Create SOPs
    This phase directly addresses your goal of "rolling over tasks" and turning past lessons into future best practices.
    1. Knowledge Extraction: I will analyze the organization's development history to identify recurring problems, effective solutions, and undocumented procedures.
    2. Create SOPs: I will synthesize these findings into formal Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and add them to the centralized knowledge base in our .github repository.
    Phase 4: Final Review and Next Chapter Planning
    1. Review the New Standard: Once the cleanup is rolled out and the initial automations are in place, we'll do a final review to ensure the new structure and workflows meet your needs.
    2. Plan for the Future: We can then officially "close this chapter" and begin planning for the next, which could involve more advanced automation, deeper strategic analysis, or tackling the other modules from your AI implementation plan.
